meta.title: Re-Evolution — Digital Agency for SMEs in Portugal
meta.description: We create professional websites, intelligent automations and AI chatbots for small and medium businesses in Portugal. Free diagnosis, delivery in 1–3 weeks.

hero.title: Your business deserves to be online. We handle everything.
hero.subtitle: We build your website, automate your repetitive tasks and get your business showing up on Google — without you needing to know anything about technology.

problem.title: While you read this, your competitors are winning customers online.

cards.title: Not showing up on Google
cards.solution: We optimise your profile and site so your customers find you first.

cards.title: Losing bookings to competitors
cards.solution: We automate the booking process so you never miss a customer.

cards.title: Manual tasks stealing hours
cards.solution: We create automatic flows that handle the repetitive work for you.

cards.title: Outdated or non-existent website
cards.solution: We create or renew your website to impress from the first click.

pillars.title: Professional Digital Presence
pillars.description: Your website, built with your customers in mind. Fast, beautiful and ranking on Google.

pillars.title: Intelligent Automations
pillars.description: No more repetitive tasks. Forms, notifications, bookings and follow-ups — all automatic.

pillars.title: 24/7 AI Assistant
pillars.description: An always-available assistant on your site that answers, qualifies and directs your customers — even while you sleep.

howItWorks.title: Simple, fast and no surprises
howItWorks.subtitle: From the first conversation to your site live in 1 to 3 weeks.

steps.title: Fast Delivery

pricing.title: Clear pricing, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: We know the cost before we start. Always.
pricing.note: WhatsApp Business API, Advanced Reports and specific integrations available as add-ons. Contact us for a custom quote.
pricing.footer: Prices exclude VAT. No fixed-term contracts.

testimonials.quote: Re-Evolution transformed the way we handle reservations. The website turned out exactly as we wanted and in less than three weeks it was live. We now have an automatic process that saves us hours every week.
testimonials.author: Arcadas do Fado

items.question: Do I need to know technology to work with you?
items.answer: No, we handle everything. Just tell us what you need and we do the rest. You don't need to know anything about technology.

items.question: How long does it take to get the website live?
items.answer: Between 1 and 3 weeks after proposal approval, depending on complexity and speed of content approval.

items.question: What happens after delivery?
items.answer: The Essential package includes 1 month of support. The Managed package includes ongoing accompaniment with monthly meetings and priority support.

items.question: Can I update the website afterwards?
items.answer: Yes, you can do it yourself or through us. We always deliver full access to the website.

items.question: Do prices include VAT?
items.answer: No, all prices shown exclude VAT. VAT will be added to the invoice as per Portuguese law.

items.question: Are there fixed-term contracts?
items.answer: No for the Essential package — it's a one-time payment. Managed is monthly and you can cancel whenever you want, with no penalties.

items.question: Do you work outside Lisbon?
items.answer: Yes, we work 100% remotely and serve clients across Portugal. Distance is not an obstacle.

items.question: Does the chatbot speak Portuguese?
items.answer: Yes, and it automatically detects the visitor's language, responding in Portuguese, English or Spanish as needed.

footer.tagline: Digital transformation for your local business.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Re-Evolution, Serviços Digitais. All rights reserved.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyse traffic and personalise content. You can manage your preferences at any time.

functional.description: Enable advanced features such as language preferences.
